name: Number C101: Silent Honor DARK
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>１０１ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｓ・Ｈ・Ｄａｒｋ Ｋｎｉｇｈｔ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サイレント・オナーズ・ダーク・ナイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Hyakuichi Sairento Onāzu Dāku Naito
name_jp_tl: Chaos Numbers 101: Silent Honors Dark Knight
desc:
3 Level 5 monsters
Once per turn: You can target 1 Special Summoned monster your opponent controls; attach it to this card as material. When this card is destroyed and sent to the GY while it has material: You can Special Summon this card from your GY, then gain LP equal to the original ATK of this card. "Number 101: Silent Honor ARK" must be in your GY to activate and to resolve this effect. If this card is Special Summoned this way, it cannot attack for the rest of this turn.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Duels From the Deep

jp_sets.set: Duelist Pack: Duelists of the Abyss

action: Attaches from your opponent's field as Xyz Material
mst: Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
